reinforce_step_1: Pib nrog dense reinforcement (piv txwv li, FR-1 lossis FR-2)
reinforce_step_2: Thaum tus cwj pwm tas li (~80%), nce ratio los ntawm 1-2
reinforce_step_3: Hloov mus rau variable schedule (VR) rau kev tswj ntuj tau zoo dua
reinforce_step_4: Maj mam nce VR tus nqi (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
fidelity_tip_1: Tshuaj xyuas cov txheej txheem implementation nrog cov neeg ua haujlwm
fidelity_tip_3: Ua kom yooj yim cov txheej txheem yog tias nyuaj heev
fidelity_tip_4: Xav txog cov kev cuam tshuam ib puag ncig rau implementation
record_tip_1: Muab tej yam tshwm sim ua ntej, thaum, thiab tom qab tus cwj pwm
record_tip_2: Hais txog qhov chaw/qhov chaw thaum ua tau
record_tip_4: Siv cov lus piav qhia tshwj xeeb, pom tau

Xav txog koj txoj kev...
• Dab tsi ua tau zoo?
• Koj yuav ua dab tsi txawv?
